meta.title: Component showcase
meta.subtitle: Browse and try every UI primitive, interaction pattern, and performance demo that ships with the template.
meta.devOnlyNotice: Preview is available in development only — these routes are excluded from production builds.

button.title: Button
button.description: Variant + size matrix with the motion/react micro-interactions baked into the primitive.
button.asChildHint: Render as an anchor while keeping button styles

card.title: Card
card.description: Plain, hoverable and structured (header + content + footer) variants. The hoverable variant lifts subtly on mouse enter when prefers-reduced-motion is off.
card.plainBody: Borders, padding and tokenised surfaces with zero extra config.
card.hoverableBody: Hover me — the whole card lifts a few pixels.
card.structuredBody: Compose CardHeader + CardContent + CardFooter to keep typography consistent.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Radix Tabs with a shared-layout motion indicator. The pill slides between triggers; under prefers-reduced-motion the layout id is dropped.
tabs.accountBody: Profile, billing, and connected services live here.
tabs.passwordBody: Rotate credentials and review active sessions.

theme.title: Theme tokens
theme.description: Every primitive paints with CSS custom properties exposed under var(--color-*). Switch the theme from the header to see all tokens flip in lock-step.

i18n.title: i18n
i18n.description: Feature copy lives under src/features/<name>/i18n/<lng>.json. Each namespace is its own lazy chunk. Switch the language to see the whole tree re-translate.
i18n.tryItHint: Hint: open the language switcher in the header.
i18n.sampleBody: This block reads from the examples namespace and updates instantly when you switch languages.

animation.title: Animation primitives
animation.description: Token-controlled timing for spinners, pulses and entrance animations. All respect prefers-reduced-motion.
animation.hoverHint: Hover the box to trigger the spring lift.

toaster.title: Toaster
toaster.description: Seven Sonner-based toaster presets ship with the template. In a scaffolded project the CLI strips down to the one you chose; here you can preview every variant side by side.

dialog.title: Dialog
dialog.description: Radix Dialog with motion/react enter/exit transitions, conditionally portalled so the subtree fully unmounts on close.
dialog.destructiveDetail: Make sure you have a backup before you proceed.
dialog.formDescription: Notes are stored locally and never sent anywhere.

motion.title: Motion
motion.description: motion/react primitives wired to common UI moments — entrance, hover, tap, layout. Toggle prefers-reduced-motion in your OS to see the static fallbacks.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Three runtime diagnostics demos: Core Web Vitals, virtualised lists, and lazy-loaded chunks. Numbers refresh every two seconds.

webVitals.title: Core Web Vitals
webVitals.description: Live readings from the web-vitals library. Numbers may be — until the underlying observer fires (LCP needs a layout, INP needs an interaction).
webVitals.interactHint: Click anywhere on the page to register an INP sample.

virtualList.title: Virtual list
virtualList.description: 10,000 rows rendered by @tanstack/react-virtual. Only the rows in the viewport are mounted, so scrolling stays smooth regardless of dataset size.
virtualList.scrollHint: Scroll the list — only visible rows are mounted.

lazyLoad.title: Lazy load
lazyLoad.description: Trigger a dynamic import and watch the Suspense fallback while the chunk is fetched. Slow Network tab in DevTools to extend the visible window.
lazyLoad.loadedBody: This component lives in its own JS chunk; it only downloaded once you asked for it.
